scripts.dev-pk: run-s build && pkexec --keep-cwd env DISPLAY=$DISPLAY WAYLAND_DISPLAY=$WAYLAND_DISPLAY XAUTHORITY=$XAUTHORITY XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR ./dist/qode ./dist/main.js
scripts.blob:linux: npm-run-all build fetch-qode:linux && rm -f payload.bin && node scripts/generateBlob.js linux
scripts.publish:linux: npm-run-all build-sea:linux && mkdir -p publish && cp sea/build/out publish/installer
scripts.blob:windows: npm-run-all build fetch-qode:windows && rm -f payload.bin && node scripts/generateBlob.js windows
scripts.publish:windows: npm-run-all build-sea:windows && mkdir -p publish && cp sea/build/out.exe publish/installer.exe
